name: operaclinic-platform
description: OperaClinic monorepo - SaaS multi-tenant para clinicas de estetica

scripts.agent:gate:run:local: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/run-agent-gate.ps1 -BaseUrl http://localhost:3001 -IntervalMinutes 15 -DurationHours 0 -FailureRateThreshold 0.05 -P95ThresholdMs 1500 -MinSnapshots 3 -Environment local-runtime-root -OutputCsv tmp/agent-readiness-local-root.csv -OutputReport tmp/agent-gate-local-root.md -ValidationDoc tmp/AGENT_GATE_LOCAL_VALIDATION.md
scripts.smoke:e2e: pnpm --filter @operaclinic/api prisma:seed && pnpm --filter @operaclinic/api smoke:e2e:seed && pnpm --filter @operaclinic/web smoke:e2e
